title: Metals rebound as China plans further stimulus measures
section_path: Metals rebound as China plans further stimulus measures
section_path_text: Metals rebound as China plans further stimulus measures
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodity markets rebounded as the focus returned to tightness in physical markets. Sentiment was also boosted by China's move to support economic growth with fiscal stimulus measures. Base metals rebounded sharply as China considered a massive USD224bn stimulus to boost growth.
